name: HiddenLineDrawingObject
summary: Represents an object added to a HiddenLineDrawing

properties.name: Geometry
properties.summary: Returns the geometry in world coordinates if UseXform is false. Otherwise, the geometry in object space coordinates is returned.

properties.name: OccludingSections
properties.summary: Objects in this drawing could have occluding sections. Objects must added with the occluding section option set as desired.

properties.name: Tag
properties.summary: Returns the extra data used to cross-reference the object specified in HiddenLineDrawing.AddObject.

properties.name: Transform
properties.summary: Returns the transformation passed into the Add... function when setting up the hidden line drawing parameters.
